Affiliate Income Calculator

Estimate your monthly and annual affiliate income based on traffic, conversion rate, and average commission.

$
$
$

How to Use This Tool

1
Enter your average monthly website traffic.
2
Enter your affiliate link conversion rate (typically 1-5% for review content).
3
Enter the average commission you earn per sale.
4
Review your monthly and annual income projections.
5
Check your income per 1,000 visitors — a key efficiency metric.
6
Scroll down to see income projections across 9 different traffic levels.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is a good conversion rate for affiliate content?

For well-targeted review and comparison content, 1-5% is typical. Top-performing affiliate sites can reach 5-10%. If you are below 0.5%, your content likely is not matching purchase intent — revisit your keyword strategy and content format.

How can I increase my average commission?

Promote higher-ticket products, negotiate better rates with affiliate managers once you have volume, and look for recurring commission programs (SaaS tools often pay 20-30% recurring). Bundling complementary products in your content can also increase average order value.

How long does it take to build meaningful affiliate traffic?

Most affiliate sites take 12-18 months to reach 25K+ monthly visitors with consistent content production. Expect 6-12 months before seeing meaningful income. The key is publishing 2-4 high-quality, SEO-optimized posts per week consistently.

Which affiliate programs pay the most?

SaaS and software affiliate programs often pay the highest commissions (20-30% recurring). Premium hosting, online courses, and financial products also have high payouts. Amazon Associates has lower rates (1-10%) but converts easily due to brand trust.

Do I need a large email list for affiliate marketing?

Not necessarily. Most affiliate income comes from organic search traffic directly to your content. However, an email list lets you promote affiliate offers repeatedly without relying on new traffic. Build both channels — SEO for acquisition, email for retention and repeat promotions.

🔗 Affiliate Income Calculator

📊 Your Traffic & Conversions • Monthly Traffic: 50,000 visitors • Conversion Rate: 2% • Avg Commission: $50.00 • Monthly Conversions: 1,000 sales 💰 Revenue Projections • Monthly Income: $50,000.00 • Annual Income: $600,000.00 • Income Per 1K Visitors: $1,000.00 🚀 Full-time affiliate income! $50,000/mo is a sustainable business. Diversify your traffic sources and affiliate programs to protect this income.
